title: Fields of the World — Global
description: Global agricultural field boundaries and prediction-quality layers at 10 m resolution, produced by applying the PRUE field-boundary segmentation model to global Sentinel-2 mosaics (Robinson et al. 2026, arXiv:2605.11055). Published openly under CC-BY-4.0 by Taylor Geospatial and collaborators. This STAC catalog currently describes the prediction confidence & quality layers; additional products (vector field boundaries, mosaics, Zarr) will be added.

links.title: FTW Global — Prediction Confidence & Quality Layers (500 m)
The first global agricultural field boundary map at 10 m resolution (arXiv:2605.11055)
